title: DSI Drug and Alcohol Testing Contract One-Year Extension for CDL Compliance
summary: One-year extension of contract with DSI for random drug/alcohol testing and CDL testing to maintain federal compliance. Originally a 2+1+1 year agreement. HR Director confirms satisfactory service. Will go to RFP when contract expires.
raw_content:
[00:05:23] Thank you. I have item number 10.
[00:05:26] >> Good afternoon, Council Rick Alceiver,
[00:05:28] director of human resources. Uh item 10
[00:05:30] is to extend our contract with DSI for
[00:05:33] one more year. Um we did a 2 plus one
[00:05:36] plus one, I believe. Um, so DSI handles
[00:05:40] all of our random drug testing and drug
[00:05:42] testing for CDLs. Um, and in order to
[00:05:45] maintain compliance, we'd like to keep
[00:05:47] them on board and when that contract is
[00:05:50] up, we'll RFP and go back to the
[00:05:53] >> drama. So, this is just one more year of
[00:05:55] this one, right?
[00:05:55] >> Correct. [clears throat] This is the
[00:05:56] extension for one year.
[00:05:57] >> Okay. Any questions?
[00:05:59] >> Any questions, concerns?
[00:06:00] >> Are we happy with the service?
[00:06:01] >> Yes, they've been doing a fantastic job.
[00:06:03] >> Okay. So
[00:06:06] >> no other question.
[00:06:07] >> Thank you very much.
[00:06:08] >> Thank you.
[00:06:09] >> Thank you.
[00:06:10] >> All right. Thank you. And uh council
[00:06:12] mach.
processing_notes: Rick Alceiver not in entity registry — HR Director
Segment 2 of 19 from Common Council Study Session, January 21st 2026
